summary: Comprehensive testing of TB Detection AI system iteration 2 completed successfully. Bearer token authentication working correctly, all backend APIs functional, frontend navigation and core workflows operational. File upload and analysis pipeline tested.
passed_tests: Backend API authentication with Bearer tokens (admin login returns access_token)
Backend API protection (401 responses for unauthenticated requests)
TB prediction API with image upload and AI model inference
Stats API returning user scan statistics
Frontend landing page with hero section and navigation
Frontend login flow with admin@example.com / admin123 credentials
Frontend user registration flow with new user creation and auto-login
Frontend dashboard loads stats cards without 401 errors
Frontend navigation to analyze page with file upload zone
Frontend file upload functionality with image preview
Frontend sidebar navigation between Dashboard, Analyze, Reports, About pages
Frontend About page displays CNN and Grad-CAM explanations
Frontend logout clears token and redirects to login page
Frontend reports page shows scan history with expandable details
Heatmap visualization section present (original X-ray and heatmap side-by-side)
PDF download report button available after analysis

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (18/19 tests passed - 1 expected error for minimal test image)
